scripts.pkg:prepare-server-agent: rm -rf apps/server-agent/.bundle /tmp/anybot-server-bundle && pnpm --filter @anybot/server-agent deploy --legacy --prod /tmp/anybot-server-bundle && find /tmp/anybot-server-bundle -type l ! -exec test -e {} \; -delete && rsync -a /tmp/anybot-server-bundle/ apps/server-agent/.bundle/ && rm -rf /tmp/anybot-server-bundle
scripts.pkg:app: pnpm run build:types && pnpm run build:common && pnpm run build:types-agent && pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:web-agent && pnpm run build:server-agent && pnpm run pkg:prepare-server-agent && pnpm run pkg:rebuild-server-agent-native && pnpm run build:desktop && pnpm --filter @anybot/desktop run dist
scripts.pkg:app:win:arm64: pnpm run build:types && pnpm run build:common && pnpm run build:types-agent && pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter @anybot/web-agent exec next build --webpack && pnpm run build:server-agent && pnpm run pkg:prepare-server-agent && pnpm run pkg:rebuild-server-agent-native && pnpm run build:desktop && pnpm --filter @anybot/desktop exec electron-builder --win --arm64
